thesis: Applied Optoelectronics is a vertically integrated optical transceiver supplier (lasers in Texas, assembly in Taiwan/China) riding datacenter 800G upgrades and a CATV Quantum Bandwidth cycle. **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue **$455.7M** (+83%); Q1 2026 revenue **$151.1M** (+51%). **[Fact]** Customer concentration is extreme: Digicomm **53%** and Microsoft **29%** of FY2025 revenue.
why_market_wrong: **Predictive attribute:** complexity discount. **[Inference]** The market may treat AAOI as a pure AI-datacenter winner (ignoring concentration and capex) or as legacy CATV cyclical (ignoring datacenter mix at **54%** of Q1 2026 revenue). **[Fact]** Reported FY2025 FCF was negative on **$179M** capex; share count rose from **60M** to **76M** diluted after equity offerings.

key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 OCF $174.4M minus normalized capex $130M [Assumption] ÷ 60.2M FY2025 diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
Scenario base — datacenter mix rises; capex normalizes after Taiwan build
Proof-first bridge 2026-07-21: core $15.00 + option $0.30 + surplus cash $3.67 − reserve $1.50

open_questions: Validate $130M normalized capex vs Taiwan lease ROU $72M Q1 2026
Quantify Amazon warrant contra-revenue path beyond $0.8M FY2025
Confirm live price and share count before sizing
